data: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS tech_doc (id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(), space_id UUID NOT NULL, title TEXT NOT NULL, content TEXT NOT NULL, source_url TEXT, doc_type VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'other', version VARCHAR(50), content_hash VARCHAR(64), created_at TIMESTAMP, updated_at TIMESTAMP)
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_techdoc_space ON tech_doc (space_id)
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_techdoc_type ON tech_doc (space_id, doc_type)
